channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Ceasefire Crumbles as Trump Says Tehran Will Pay Price for Failed Talks
item.description: A US-Iran ceasefire appears to have collapsed after Trump warned Iran will face consequences for not reaching a deal, with fresh US strikes and Iranian retaliation reported.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Launches Long-Range Strikes on Military and Energy Sites Deep Inside Russia
item.description: A series of long-range Ukrainian attacks hit targets deep inside Russia, part of Kyivs efforts to raise the costs of the war for Moscow.

item.title: 💰 US Consumer Inflation Hits Fastest Pace in Three Years as Iran War Drives Energy Costs
item.description: US consumer inflation increased at its fastest pace in three years in May as the Middle East conflict raised gasoline and energy prices, giving the Fed more reason to keep rates unchanged.

item.title: 🛢️ Global Oil Stockpiles Headed Toward Lowest Levels Since 2003 Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Oil inventories in major economies are approaching multi-decade lows as the Iran war draws down reserves at a record pace, the US Energy Information Administration warned.

item.title: 🌍 Iran War Threatens Millions With Crisis-Level Hunger, World Food Programme Warns
item.description: Ripple effects from the war in Iran are threatening millions more vulnerable people with crisis levels of hunger, the World Food Programme chief said.

item.title: 🇶🇦 Qatari Negotiators Travel to Tehran to Narrow Gaps in US-Iran Talks
item.description: Qatari negotiators have traveled to Tehran in an effort to bridge gaps in US-Iran nuclear talks, a diplomat said, as the conflict continues.

item.title: ⚠️ US Allies Condemn Iran's Lethal Plotting in Europe, North America and Australia
item.description: US allies have condemned Iran's lethal plotting operations across Europe, North America, and Australia amid heightened tensions.

item.title: ⚔️ Cargo Vessel Exchanges Fire with Armed Craft Off Yemen Coast
item.description: A cargo vessel exchanged fire with armed craft off the Yemen coast, the UK Maritime Trade Operations said, highlighting continued regional threats.

item.title: 🇹🇼 US Sells Weapons to Taiwan, But With Drones the Flow May Reverse
item.description: The US usually sells weapons to Taiwan, but with drones the dynamic may shift as Taiwan develops its own drone capabilities.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea, China Claim Wins from Xi Visit, but Limits Remain
item.description: North Korea and China both walked away claiming major wins from Xi Jinping's visit, which elevated Kim Jong Un's global stature and pulled Pyongyang more tightly into Beijing's orbit.

item.title: 🇦🇷 Argentine Peso Drops Most in Over Eight Weeks Since Midterm Selloff
item.description: Argentina's peso dropped the most in over eight weeks following a midterm selloff and shock therapy economic policies.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Military Helicopter Crashes in Kashmir, All on Board Killed
item.description: A Pakistan military helicopter crashed in Kashmir, killing all on board in a deadly incident amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian-Held Crimea Grapples with Fuel Shortages After Ukrainian Drone Attacks
item.description: Residents in Russian-controlled Crimea faced gasoline rationing after Ukrainian drone attacks constricted supplies from Russia.

item.title: 🇦🇫 Pakistan Airstrikes Kill at Least 13 in Afghanistan, Taliban Says
item.description: Pakistan airstrikes killed at least 13 people in Afghanistan, the Taliban said, amid escalating cross-border tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Anti-Immigrant Violence Erupts Across Belfast After Knife Attack
item.description: Anti-immigrant violence erupted across Belfast following a knife attack, with tensions flaring in Northern Ireland.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Rises Nearly 1% as US Launches New Strikes Against Iran, Supply Tightens
item.description: Oil prices rose nearly 1% as the US launched new strikes against Iran and supply continued to tighten amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 💰 ECB, BOE Weigh Possible Mistakes as Iran War Fuels Inflation
item.description: The European Central Bank and Bank of England are weighing possible policy mistakes as the Iran war threatens to fuel inflation further.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Erdogan Says Israel's Attacks on Syria, Lebanon Threaten Turkey Too
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan said Israel's attacks on Syria and Lebanon threaten Turkey as well, warning of regional spillover.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Warns Russian Attacks on Odesa Ports Threaten Export Collapse
item.description: Ukraine warned that Russian attacks on Odesa ports threaten to collapse exports, a critical economic lifeline for the country.

item.title: 💶 EU Proposes 21st Package of Sanctions Targeting Russia's Banks
item.description: The European Union proposed its 21st package of sanctions targeting Russia's banks, continuing pressure over the Ukraine war.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel West Bank Actions Amount to Ethnic Cleansing, Amnesty Report Says
item.description: Amnesty International said Israel's actions in the West Bank amount to ethnic cleansing of Palestinians, issuing a damning report.

item.title: 🇦🇫 Afghanistan Says Pakistan Air Raids Killed 13 People Including Children
item.description: Afghanistan said Pakistan air raids killed 13 people including children, as cross-border violence escalated.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Targets US Bases in Jordan and Gulf After Trump Orders Strikes Near Hormuz
item.description: Iran targeted US bases in Jordan and the Gulf after Trump ordered strikes near the Strait of Hormuz, escalating the conflict.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Test-Fires US Rocket System for First Time as Chinese Mainland Watches
item.description: Taiwan test-fired a US rocket system for the first time, a significant military development as China watches closely.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine, Latvia Sign Drone Deal as Zelenskiy Meets Nordic and Baltic Leaders
item.description: Ukraine signed a drone deal with Latvia as President Zelenskiy met with Nordic and Baltic leaders at a summit in Tallinn, Estonia.
